meta.description: A high-energy activewear e-commerce store with a bold, modern, and performance-driven aesthetic. The layout features prominent promotional banners, full-bleed hero imagery, and a clean product grid targeting fitness enthusiasts.

header.notes: Features a full-width search input field with rounded pill shape on the right side next to icon buttons. Logo is strictly centered. Includes an announcement bar above the main header.

footer.notes: Footer is not visible in the provided screenshot.

productCard.notes: Clean product cards with grey background (#e5e5e0). Heart icon (wishlist) floats top right. Small rectangular badge bottom left over image. Title, variant info, and price are left-aligned below the image. Price is bold.

productGrid.notes: Very tight gap between product cards. Features a small label above a bold section heading, and an underlined 'View All' link next to the heading. Carousel navigation arrows top right.

featuredProducts.label: WOMENS
featuredProducts.heading: THE WHITNEY LEGGING IS BACK
featuredProducts.notes: Section header sits above the grid, left-aligned, with prominent bold typography.

sections.name: announcement-bar
sections.layout: Full-width, single row, text centered, small play/pause icon right

content.headline: Promotional offer announcement
content.specialElements: Tiny play/pause icon indicates a carousel or ticker

sections.notes: Sits at the very top of the page above the main navigation.

sections.name: sale-banner
sections.layout: Full-width single column, text centered, generous padding

design.text: Black text, bold display font for headline, normal sans for body

content.headline: Major upcoming sale announcement
content.body: Details about sale start time and conditions
content.cta: Underlined text link acting as a button
content.specialElements: Countdown timer displayed prominently in center

sections.notes: Acts as a secondary, highly visible announcement area directly below header.

sections.name: featured-collection
sections.layout: Three equal-width columns forming one continuous panoramic image area

design.background: Seamless lifestyle product photography with models against neutral backdrop
design.text: White text overlaid on bottom left over a dark gradient
design.styling: Full bleed edge-to-edge, dark bottom gradient overlay to ensure text readability

content.headline: Collection specific title, bold sans-serif
content.body: Short descriptive text highlighting product features
content.cta: Underlined white text link acting as button

media.description: Three models wearing different colors of the same activewear set (green, blue, pink) against a beige studio background

content.specialElements: Dark gradient overlay at the bottom covering roughly bottom 25% of the image

sections.notes: Creates a strong visual impact showcasing product color variations simultaneously.

sections.name: product-grid
sections.layout: Heading with navigation arrows above a 4-column tight grid

design.background: White page background, light grey image backgrounds
design.text: Dark grey/black text for product info, bold prices
design.styling: Very tight grid gaps (~4px), minimalistic card design

content.headline: Bold collection/product name return announcement

media.description: Studio shots of models wearing activewear leggings, cropped from waist to feet, neutral background

content.specialElements: Wishlist heart icons top right of images, small descriptive pills bottom left of images

sections.notes: Includes circular carousel prev/next buttons top right of the section.

sections.name: hero-collection
sections.layout: Full bleed single image, text overlay bottom left

design.styling: Dark gradient overlay at bottom for text contrast

content.headline: New arrivals bold title
content.body: Short promotional sentence targeting a specific customer persona
content.cta: Two underlined white text links side-by-side acting as buttons

media.description: Dynamic, slightly motion-blurred shot of muscular men working out in a gym setting, dramatic lighting

sections.notes: Contrasts the clean studio shots above with gritty, high-energy environment photography.
